codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the feature adds a repeatable local reset harness, deterministic validation-only actor seeding, and curated current-contract regression coverage for the legacy final-hardening suites. The reviewed transcript skeleton shows the worker rebuilt the compose runtime, verified seeded logins for MOCK and RIVAL actors, reran `gate-fast`, and ran the new `final-validation-targeted-tests` command, while the diff keeps production behavior untouched outside the opt-in `validation-seed` profile and test/runtime harness files.

summary: Pass. Final-hardening now has a deterministic reset path, seeded cross-tenant validation actors, and a passing curated regression surface for real-user, adversarial, calculation, and replay/concurrency validation preparation.
